welcome.title: Welcome to InterviewReadyAI
welcome.description: Your ultimate platform for technical preparation and career growth. Ready for a quick tour?

quizzes.title: Smart Quizzes
quizzes.description: Practice with AI-generated quizzes personalized for your seniority or explore our community library.

flashcards.title: Dynamic Flashcards
flashcards.description: Learn with AI-generated interactive flashcards. Review important concepts and retain knowledge efficiently.

interviews.title: Interview Simulations
interviews.description: Practice technical interviews with AI. Get detailed feedback on your answers and improve your performance.

tokens.title: Token System
tokens.description: Earn tokens by completing challenges and maintaining your streak. Buy more tokens or use them to generate advanced quizzes and mentoring.

community.title: TreinaVaga Community
community.description: Connect with other users, see community progress and share achievements. Learn collaboratively!

metrics.title: Metrics and Progress
metrics.description: Track your detailed progress. Identify weak spots and compare your performance in the global ranking.

createQuiz.title: Create your first Quiz
createQuiz.description: Generate personalized quizzes from job listing links.

practice.title: Practice Interviews
practice.description: Simulate technical interviews with AI and get detailed feedback.
